description: Product overview for Workflow UI Authoring V2: Workflows authoring surface plus Projects execution surface for normal Pibo users.

userStories.title: Add Workflows main-nav product surface
userStories.description: As a Pibo user, I need a Workflows navigation surface so that global workflow browsing and authoring have a clear home.
acceptanceCriteria: Chat Web main navigation contains a visible Workflows item and selecting it renders the Workflows surface
The Workflows surface renders Workflow Library and Workflow Builder entry cards or empty-state panels
The surface is visible to authenticated users using existing Chat Web auth rules
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Project workflow session creation entry point
userStories.description: As a Pibo user, I need a Project session creation flow that can choose a workflow before execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Project session creation exposes a workflow-backed session option in the main Project content area
The creation flow selects a workflow version from the global catalog
The flow does not start a workflow run during initial session creation
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Separate configured session save from workflow start
userStories.description: As a Pibo user, I want session creation and workflow start to be separate so that I can review configuration first.
acceptanceCriteria: Creating a workflow Project session leaves it in a configured/not-started state
The configured session shows an explicit Start action
No workflow run record is created until Start is accepted
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add duplicate-to-draft authoring path
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I need to duplicate an existing workflow so that I can create a UI-authored variant without editing code-owned definitions.
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow Library exposes Duplicate for eligible code and UI workflows
Duplicate creates or opens a UI draft owned by the Workflow Registry/store
Code-registered workflow definitions remain read-only in the UI
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Show workflow run inspection from Projects
userStories.description: As a Project reviewer, I need workflow run inspection and human actions in Projects so that I can monitor and control execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow Project sessions route to a Workflow/XState plus run view
Run view shows separate status, current node, output, error, and pending human action sections with populated values or explicit empty states
Agent node and subagent sessions continue to route to Terminal view
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Verified existing Projects Workflow/XState run inspection, explicit empty states, human action empty state, and Terminal fallback routing.

userStories.title: Enforce V2 explicit non-goals in visible surfaces
userStories.description: As a product reviewer, I need V2 scope boundaries enforced so that authoring does not expand into unsupported features.
acceptanceCriteria: No UI path exposes inline TypeScript, JavaScript, shell, eval, or arbitrary executable code
No UI path exposes raw XState editing, workflow templates, workflow slash commands, workflow tools for agents, or Zod schema authoring
YAML/JSON import/export and TypeScript export are absent from V2 product surfaces
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added visible V2 scope-boundary panels to Workflows and Project workflow creation surfaces; verified no UI authoring path exposes the deferred executable, XState, templates, import/export, slash-command/tool, or Zod paths.

userStories.title: Document Project workflow smoke checklist
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I need a focused smoke checklist for Project workflow execution so that manual validation is repeatable.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a documented manual smoke checklist for select workflow, configure session, save, start, and inspect run
The checklist names the expected configured/not-started state before Start
The checklist names the expected run status and inspection sections after Start
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added a Project workflow execution smoke checklist covering select, configure, save, configured/not-started review, start, run inspection sections, and human wait resolution.

userStories.title: Document builder authoring smoke checklist
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I need a focused smoke checklist for workflow authoring so that manual validation is repeatable.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a documented manual smoke checklist for duplicate workflow, edit draft, validate, and publish
The checklist names the expected draft validation diagnostics behavior
The checklist names the expected immutable published version result
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added a Workflow Builder authoring smoke checklist covering duplicate-to-draft, draft edits, validation diagnostics refresh/blocking behavior, publish, immutable version hashes, and version history/picker expectations.

userStories.title: Document historical lifecycle smoke checklist
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I need a focused smoke checklist for lifecycle history so that archive and delete do not break inspection.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a documented manual smoke checklist step for archive/delete historical-run inspection linked to prd_06 lifecycle stories
The checklist names the expected snapshot-only state after live definition deletion
The checklist names the expected archived workflow selection behavior
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added the historical archive/delete lifecycle smoke checklist with PRD 06 linkage, archived selection expectations, and snapshot-only deleted-definition run inspection expectations.
